subject: Large pink-skinned rotund figure in white and purple vest extending a fist, powerful build
description: A large, rotund figure with distinctly pink skin dominates the frame. The figure wears a white vest with purple trim and has a round, smooth head with small dark eyes and antennae-like head pieces. One fist is extended forward as if delivering a punch, with a burst of energy or impact visible near the knuckle. The expression is somewhere between effort and amusement, consistent with a powerful but not purely malevolent character. The composition emphasizes the figure's imposing bulk against a light, energetic background.
foreground: Large pink rotund figure in white/purple vest, fist extended, impact burst
background: Light energetic background, pale yellow-white glow
emotion: playful aggression, powerful exertion, mild amusement
